## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss various tasks and priorities, including completing W9 forms, managing leads from a recent webinar, and setting up weekly sync meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alice to prioritize processing webinar leads by verifying information and categorizing as potential leads](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more context during weekly syncs on his schedule/priorities for the upcoming week](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Alice encouraged to be proactive in scheduling meetings and taking notes in the CRM](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Topics

### W9 Form Completion

  - [Marcel walked Alice through completing a W9 form for a client using PandaDoc](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Discussed auto-filling dates and sending drafts before finalizing](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Webinar Lead Processing

  - [Alice received the final webinar lead list and needs to prioritize processing it](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Involves verifying information, categorizing leads, and adding to the CRM](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized getting legitimate leads categorized quickly to begin follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Weekly Sync Meetings

  - [Agreed to have weekly sync meetings, likely on Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Allows Marcel to provide context on his schedule/priorities for the upcoming week](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Alice encouraged to be proactive in scheduling and getting time on Marcel's calendar](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

### General Feedback

  - [Marcel requested Alice be more proactive in scheduling meetings when needed](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Suggested taking detailed notes/context in the CRM for all contacts/interactions](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to prioritize processing webinar leads](https://fathom.video/share/6zGWZcRLyLXYyGiPrALWJuAWJJriqEV6?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
